CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnSyncProperty
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
log(name) log(value.Name) if name ~= "TriggeredBy" then return end if value == nil then return end if self.Target == nil then return end
if value == _UserService.LocalPlayer then self.Target.Enable = true log("내가 밟음") else log("다른 사람이 밟음") end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity if TriggerBodyEntity == nil then return end
local myPlayer = _UserService.LocalPlayer -- Sync로 변수 동기화 self.TriggeredBy = TriggerBodyEntity
